title: CAM, TT&A, WvT, Trowers & Hamlins act on ACEN India securing ₹751 crore funding for 100 MW wind project in Karnataka
description: ACEN India unit Diyos Renewables India Project Private Limited has secured a term loan facility and non-fund based facilities aggregating to ₹751 crore from MUFG Bank, Ltd. and Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advised Diyos Renewables India Project on this transaction.TT&A served as the Indian legal counsel for MUFG Bank and SMBC on this financing deal.The transaction team consisted of Pallavi Meena (Partner), Pragya Sood (Partner), Akshay Malhotra (Partner), Pra
